scripts.deploy: tar -acf deploy.zip build package.json package-lock.json .deployment && az webapp deploy --name %npm_package_config_resourceWebApp% --resource-group %npm_package_config_resourceGroup% --src-path deploy.zip --type zip --clean true && az webapp config set --name %npm_package_config_resourceWebApp% --resource-group %npm_package_config_resourceGroup% --startup-file "node build/index.js" && del deploy.zip
